ideation: This animation sequence portrays a robot carefully holding a medical symbol, emphasizing precision and care. The robot's movements will be deliberate and controlled, reflecting the seriousness and responsibility associated with medical care. Frame 1: Both arms are extended forward and slightly downward, with the hands open and palms facing upward to receive the medical symbol. Frame 2: The right arm moves slightly upward to receive the symbol, with the wrist slightly angled to cradle it. The left arm remains in place, offering support. Frame 3: Both arms gently move the symbol closer to the robot's body.  Frame 4: Both arms carefully hold the medical symbol in front of the robot's chest, with the hands positioned to maintain a firm yet gentle grip. The entire motion aims for a calm, collected presentation of the medical symbol, reflecting the care and professionalism expected in a medical setting.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, palms up to receive
right arm lifts and cradles the symbol gently
both arms bring the symbol closer with care
arms hold the symbol steady before the chest
